## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. Include relevant motivation and context.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / code cleanup

## How Has This Been Tested?

Describe the tests you ran to verify your changes. Include backend(s) tested against.

- [ ] Tested with llama.cpp backend
- [ ] Tested with LM Studio backend
- [ ] Tested with Ollama backend
- [ ] Manual verification in the GUI

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's code style
- [ ] I have reviewed my own changes
- [ ] My changes do not introduce new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have tested with at least one backend
